@WeVennStudios x An indie dev was just offered $100 for the full rights to their Steam game. Moments like that highlight how little shared context most of us have for what an indie game is actually worth. Even in a clear flop, the IP itself can still carry real speculative value. A buyer offering $100 isn’t usually buying the current game’s tiny revenue stream... they’re buying the rights to do so
